questions.question: Anna Kendrick and Skylar Astin starred in this musical film.
In 2017 Mattel debuted rebranded dolls with new features. What was the name of the male doll with the updo?
What 2014 Meghan Trainor song was intended to promote a positive body image and self-acceptance?
What company had movies illegally released online and private emails hacked, forcing many executives to apologize for disparaging well-known actors?
What did "shoot your shot" mean?
questions.answer: Making the move to ask someone out
